# Curated Reference Icons (from Simple Icons)

15 hand-picked SVGs illustrating the design patterns and constraints described in `design-rules.md` and `motif-patterns.md`. Use them as "gold standard" examples when generating and reviewing new logos.

Each entry: **name · hex · why it teaches something · full SVG**.

---

## 1. GitHub · `#181717` — silhouette / mascot mark
